events.title: ITEAMS task-order protest
events.summary: Leidos protested the ITEAMS task-order award. GAO dismissed after the agency elected limited corrective action without pausing overall performance.
events.assessment: The protest shows live competitive pressure around the vehicle, but the dismissal posture points to limited disruption rather than a full reset.

events.title: ITEAMS bridge-order protest
events.summary: HII challenged a bridge-order execution decision tied to the ITEAMS vehicle. GAO denied the protest on the merits.
events.assessment: The denial still matters because it names an active challenger and confirms sustained legal interest around the bridge posture.

events.title: ITEAMS corrective-action protest
events.summary: ManTech filed a protest tied to a corrective-action phase on the ITEAMS vehicle. The agency took targeted corrective action before a full merits ruling.
events.assessment: Corrective action indicates live process friction even without a final merits decision, which matters for recompete timing and challenger persistence.
